title: Cortex Build Progress
subtitle: Current release: v2.1.0 — KyberBot parity 0.958, Gap 1 layered defence shipped
purpose: Live view of shipped releases and next-phase work. v2.1.0 published pending OTP.

tasks.title: Repo bootstrap (local)
tasks.note: Local-only; GitHub remote deferred pending KybernesisAI org access confirmation.

tasks.title: Workspace shell
tasks.note: Bun 1.3.10 + TypeScript 5.9.3 + ESLint 10.4.0 (bumped from 9) + Vitest 4.1.6 (bumped from 2). Initial guard wrapper scripts removed at T4 in favor of a real root tsconfig with project references.

tasks.title: cortex-contracts: data model schemas
tasks.note: First package landed. 9 Zod schemas + Scopes (Memory, Chunk, Entity, Edge, Fact, Contradiction, Insight, EntityProfile, AgentSelf). 22 tests passing across 7 test files. Wrapper scripts deleted; root tsconfig.json now uses real project references. Granular subpath exports declared (./scopes, ./memory, ./entity, ./edge, ./fact, ./insight, ./agent-self). Zod 3.x pinned per SPEC.

tasks.title: cortex-contracts: interfaces & envelopes
tasks.note: Contracts package complete. Logger interface (debug/info/warn/error + ctx) + createNoopLogger fallback. QueryResult<T> freshness envelope + queryResultSchema factory for runtime validation. 7 provider interfaces: StructuredStore (full CRUD), VectorStore, EmbeddingProvider, LLMProvider, RerankerProvider (optional), Scheduler, JobQueue. 37 tests passing across 10 test files (was 22 across 7). Subpath exports added: ./logger, ./query-result, ./providers. Provider methods are minimal at v0.1; additive growth in v0.x.

tasks.title: cortex-config
tasks.note: Second package landed. Three-layer config loader (defaults → file → env) with explicit env map (no implicit process.env access). 7 nested config sections with locked-in defaults from arcana-spec.md §11: sleep, decay (2%/wk floor 0.30), retrieval (RRF k=60, graph hops 2, reranker off), chunking (300/75), tier (cloud's strict thresholds), sourceWeights (5 sources), logging. Result is deep-frozen. 28 new tests across 2 files (config.test.ts and load-config.test.ts); total 65 tests across 12 files. Subpath exports: ./config, ./load-config. Root tsconfig.json references updated.

tasks.title: cortex-core: skeleton + zones
tasks.note: Third package landed. Kernel skeleton matches SPEC zone layout: ingest/, retrieve/, maintain/, access/{bindings,query,command}. Each zone exports a createXxx(deps) factory pattern returning an API object with stub methods that throw NotImplementedError. Factory pattern locks the shape so T9 testkit + T10 libsql provider can build against a stable surface. SLEEP_STEPS const exports the 13-step pipeline order from arcana-spec.md §10. NotImplementedError class in src/errors.ts. access/bindings/ is empty placeholder for T8 createCortex(). 15 new tests across 6 files; total 80 tests across 18 files. Subpath exports: ./errors, ./ingest, ./retrieve, ./maintain, ./access/{bindings,query,command}.

tasks.title: cortex-core: createCortex() factory
tasks.note: Kernel assembly complete. createCortex(opts) wires the five zone factories (ingest, retrieve, maintain, access.query, access.command) into one Cortex instance with providers injected via closure. CortexOptions requires structured/vector/embed/llm; logger/reranker/scheduler/queue/installSignalHandlers are optional. Logger defaults to createNoopLogger() from cortex-contracts. Missing scheduler/queue fall back to internal stubs that throw NotImplementedError with a clear message when their methods fire — so maintain operations fail fast instead of hanging. .providers is frozen via Object.freeze so the dependency graph can't be mutated post-construction. installSignalHandlers is accepted and stored for v0.x; no handlers registered yet. Top-level export added to packages/cortex-core/src/index.ts so `import { createCortex } from '@kybernesis/cortex-core'` works without subpath. 6 new tests; total 86 tests across 19 files (was 80 across 18). cortex-core is now v0.1.0-complete.

tasks.title: KB-faithful Layer 0 scoring fix
tasks.note: content-only word-match-ratio (0.5 + ratio*0.5) replaces BM25-derived FTS5 rank. Matches KB fact-retrieval.ts:159-178. FactsFulltextMatch.content passthrough added. ADR 011 port-first.

tasks.title: Library rename Arcana → Cortex (BREAKING)
tasks.note: 6 packages renamed @kybernesis/arcana-* → @kybernesis/cortex-*. Factory createArcana → createCortex. All 6 arcana-* packages deprecated on npm. ADR 014. GitHub repo, local dir, git remote updated.

tasks.title: CORTEX_* env vars (was ARCANA_*)
tasks.note: All 13 ENV_MAP keys renamed CORTEX_*. Any deployment using ARCANA_* was silently ignored post-rename. Pre-Phase-2 blocker.

tasks.title: transaction() inFlight concurrency guard
tasks.note: Throws 'concurrent or nested transactions not supported' immediately if called while a transaction is in flight. Prevents silent data corruption at await boundaries.

tasks.title: deleteEntity uses store.transaction()
tasks.note: Replaced inline BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK with store.transaction() to use the guarded path.

tasks.title: Gap 1 layered defence — stopwords + minMatchRatio
tasks.note: DEFAULT_STOPWORDS (~30 English commons) in buildFtsQuery. minMatchRatio floor (default 0.2) in factRetrieval Layer 0. Full configurability via FactRetrievalInput. Closes q-events-april gap. ADR 011 updated with measured 0.958 parity.

tasks.title: Publish v2.1.0 to npm
tasks.note: Awaiting OTP from David. Run: ! pnpm publish -r --access public --otp YOUR_CODE

tasks.title: npm scope reservation
tasks.note: Org 'kybernesis' confirmed (not kybernesisai). Scope @kybernesis/* is active. Publish blocked on OTP browser flow — user handling manually.

tasks.title: KyberBot DVR-EC-002: temperature/maxTokens honesty in ClaudeLLMProvider
tasks.note: Drop temperature/maxTokens at type boundary with Omit<...> + comment, or wire through CLI flags. Must be fixed before cortex-adoption branch merges.

tasks.title: KyberBot DVR-BH-002/EC-006: OPENAI_API_KEY guard
tasks.note: Wrap in try/catch or gate behind cortex.enabled flag. Prevents startup crash when OPENAI_API_KEY is absent. Must be fixed before cortex-adoption branch merges.

tasks.title: KyberBot DVR-CQ-002/UT-005: extract bootCortex(root) from run.ts + integration test
tasks.note: bootCortex(root) should be a testable function extracted from run.ts. Add integration test that verifies it wires Cortex correctly. Must be done before cortex-adoption branch merges.

tasks.title: KyberBot DVR-EC-007/BH-003: cortex-singleton double-init fix
tasks.note: Dispose-then-reinit or throw on second call. Prevents Cortex being initialized twice (e.g. on reload or reconnect). Must be fixed before cortex-adoption branch merges.

tasks.title: Layer 0 priority comparator (equal-score ordering)
tasks.note: factRetrieval sort on line 640 has no secondary key. Equal-score ordering is arbitrary. Add MEMORY_PRIORITY as secondary comparator, then recency. Requires test first.

tasks.title: tokenBudget enforcement — truncate assembledContext
tasks.note: tokenBudget currently only derives topK. assembledContext is unbounded — can exceed budget by 25x. Truncate to tokenBudget * 4 chars after assembly, recompute tokenEstimate. Write test first.

tasks.title: BM25 sum vs max — verify correct aggregation
tasks.note: keywordScore uses Math.max per channel. KB sums. 1-line fix but must validate via parity harness before+after. Run harness before touching.

tasks.title: Write 5 missing tests (audit finding)
tasks.note: tokenBudget topK derivation; equal-score tiebreaker; searchFactsFulltext content passthrough; BM25 additive property; inactive/non-latest memory filter. All Phase 2 targets are currently untested.

tasks.title: Wire ConfigSchema or remove dead config
tasks.note: ConfigSchema.retrieval.rrfK etc are defined but never wired — RRF_K=60 is hardcoded in retrieve. Either wire the config or remove the dead schema fields. SleepConfig is the only config that actually runs.

tasks.title: Mochaccino documentation — layered defence reasoning
tasks.note: KyberBot requested Mochaccino writeup of the three-mechanism design (why three not one). Capture: stopword list rationale, minMatchRatio rationale, layered-defence pattern, trade-offs. The WHY matters more than the config schema.

tasks.title: Wait for KyberBot v2.1.0 parity re-run
tasks.note: Expected meanOverlap ≈0.983 (q-events-april → 1.0; q-kube-outage still 0.83 pending KBOT workstream A/B seeding).

tasks.title: cortex-testkit revival (smaller scope)
tasks.note: T9 was deferred, but demand from KyberBot module #1 brought it back — exactly the demand-driven flow. Smaller scope: just the 4 fake providers (StructuredStore, VectorStore, EmbeddingProvider, LLMProvider), no compliance suite yet.

tasks.title: cortex-core/ingest.storeMemory implementation
tasks.note: First real kernel method implementation. Scope-locked to the canonical row write (build Memory with defaults, validate via MemorySchema, persist via StructuredStore, return id). Deliberately excluded: chunking, embedding, fact extraction, edge creation — those land when retrieval demands them. djb2 contentHash + crypto.randomUUID id. Caller from KyberBot's timeline.ts mirror path.

tasks.title: cortex-core/command — upsertEntity, deleteEntity, linkNodes
tasks.note: Three command methods implemented + linkMemories renamed to linkNodes per ADR 001 (name disagreed with NodeRef signature). Contract change: deleteEntity added to StructuredStore interface (additive). Tests grew from 102→116. Demand-driven loop continues to work as designed.

tasks.title: FactSchema correction + recordFact + queryFacts (ADR 004)
tasks.note: FactSchema: fact (sentence) now required; attribute/value optional. ADR 003 superseded by ADR 004. recordFact: validates via FactSchema, mints UUID id + ISO createdAt + isLatest=true, persists via structured.storeFact. queryFacts: reads via structured.getFactsForEntity, wraps in QueryResult envelope. Tests: 116→131.

tasks.title: updateMemory + pin + moveToTier (ADR 005)
tasks.note: Memory is not append-only. updateMemory: partial update; contentHash recomputed when content changes; scopes replaces (no deep merge). pin/moveToTier become thin wrappers over updateMemory. StructuredStore.updateMemory added to cortex-contracts. Resolves DVR-UT-006 orphan-mirror fix path. Tests: 131→141.

tasks.title: markFactSuperseded + storeContradiction + Contradiction.rationale (ADR 006)
tasks.note: markFactSuperseded: pure-link op sets isLatest=false + supersededBy on old fact. storeContradiction: kernel facade over provider; mints id + createdAt; status defaults 'pending'; rationale optional. ContradictionSchema gains rationale?: string field. correctFact stub deleted (dead surface — no consumer wants combined create-and-supersede). Tests: 141→151.

tasks.title: Memory.status field (ADR 007 §3.1)
tasks.note: MemoryStatusSchema = z.enum(['active','archived','deleted']). MemorySchema.status required. ingest.storeMemory defaults status to 'active'. Brain audit revealed this is a domain feature (both KyberBot and Brain track memory lifecycle). Tests: 151→156.

tasks.title: Memory-level supersession — markMemorySuperseded (ADR 007 §3.2)
tasks.note: MemorySchema.isLatest: boolean (required). MemorySchema.supersededBy?: string. StructuredStore.markMemorySuperseded pure-link op mirrors markFactSuperseded. ingest.storeMemory defaults isLatest to true. Testkit fake updated with throw-on-unknown-id semantics. Tests: 156→162.

tasks.title: ProfileEntry schema replacing EntityProfile.staticFacts: string[] (ADR 007 §4)
tasks.note: ProfileEntrySchema: {value, factId?, confidence?, recordedAt?}. EntityProfileSchema.staticFacts changed from string[] to ProfileEntry[]. Flat-string callers migrate trivially: wrap each string in {value}. Brain's structured arrays project naturally. 5 new tests + regression test that raw strings now throw. Tests: 162→162 (6 files reused, count unchanged at 162; test count is additive within files).

tasks.title: ADR 008: Brain migration analysis (brain-vs-harness classification)
tasks.note: Classifies every proposed Kyber in Cloud feature as brain (Cortex domain) vs harness (OAuth, connectors, multi-tenant, Motus — NOT Cortex). Confirms: expiresAt/surprisalScore/lastReinforcedAt already in FactSchema (contracts) but NOT surfaced in kernel methods or sleep pipeline yet. Identifies 5 Convex artifacts Kyber in Cloud must shed before adopting Cortex: 4-flat-ID edges, shadow entity rows, loose enum vocab, _creationTime, reactive query patterns. Timeline query (queryFacts with asOf) identified as a missing kernel method.

tasks.title: cortex-config merged into cortex-core (package deleted)
tasks.note: cortex-config package DELETED. Files moved to packages/cortex-core/src/config/. @kybernesis/cortex-core now exports loadConfig, getDefaultConfig, ENV_MAP, ConfigSchema directly. Package graph reduced from 5 to 4. tsconfig.json project references updated. Publish pipeline updated to 4 packages.

tasks.title: vector optional in CortexOptions + createMissingVectorStore()
tasks.note: CortexOptions.vector changed from required to optional. createMissingVectorStore() fallback added — same pattern as the existing no-op scheduler/queue stubs. Callers including KyberBot's initCortex() do not need to wire a VectorStore until hybridSearch is demanded. Delivery review patch DVR (Cortex-side).

tasks.title: DVR-EC-001: cortex-provider-libsql connect() mkdir fix
tasks.note: connect() now calls mkdirSync(path.dirname(url), {recursive: true}) before opening a file-path database. Fixes crash when the data directory does not yet exist. In-memory (:memory:) path is unaffected. Delivery review patch (Cortex-side).

tasks.title: docs/requirements/brain-migration-requirements.md created
tasks.note: Full spec-writer output. Comprehensive requirements document for Kyber in Cloud migration to Cortex. Covers all 5 Convex artifacts to shed, migration phases, and success criteria. Future work — migration itself requires cortex-provider-postgres (not yet built).

tasks.title: getEntityProfile implementation
tasks.note: Assembles from live facts/insights/neighbors; stores result; returns from storage on second call; QueryResult envelope. Demand-driven (T11). No VectorStore required — pure structured data assembly.

tasks.title: factRetrieval implementation
tasks.note: Structured-only text-match; scores by word-hit ratio; annotates with why field. hybridSearch path deferred until sqlite-vec + FTS5 ready. Demand-driven (T12).

tasks.title: cortex-provider-sqlite-vec
tasks.note: New package: VectorStore via vec0 virtual table; rowid_ref companion pattern; :memory: testing; 11 tests. All packages bumped to v0.1.1. Package graph back to 5 packages.

tasks.title: FTS+hybrid sprint — searchFulltext contract + libsql FTS5 + kernel hybridSearch + queryFacts asOf
tasks.note: Sprint scope (docs/plans/2026-05-20-fts-and-hybridsearch.md). Additive only — KyberBot untouched per ADR 009 parity-gate principle. Deliverables: (a) searchFulltext on StructuredStore + FulltextMatch/FulltextSearchOpts/FulltextField types; (b) libsql memories_fts virtual table + 3 sync triggers + impl; (c) kernel hybridSearch with RRF (k=60) over keyword + semantic + graph, wave-1 KyberBot-parity result shape (semanticScore/keywordScore/graphScore/matchType), per-channel failure isolation, optional reranker; (d) optional asOf on queryFacts + getFactsForEntity (bitemporal valid-time); (e) ADR 009 parity-gate methodology; (f) ADR 010 sleep step reconciliation deferred; (g) mochaccino matrix evolution with consumer columns. Tests 212 → 232.

tasks.title: cortex-testkit compliance suite
tasks.deferred_to: when a second real provider exists alongside libsql
tasks.reason: The 4 fake providers landed (v0.x.001). The original compliance harness — runComplianceSuite(provider) cross-checking implementations — stays deferred. cortex-provider-sqlite-vec now exists; compliance harness can be wired when both are battle-tested.

tasks.title: CI: ci.yml
tasks.reason: Local-only repo, no PR flow yet.

tasks.title: Sleep pipeline implementation (runSleepPipeline / startSleepSchedule / stopSleepSchedule)
tasks.deferred_to: when KyberBot sleep modules fully adopted
tasks.reason: 13-step pipeline; all three methods stubbed. expiresAt/surprisalScore/lastReinforcedAt already in FactSchema contracts but pipeline that uses them is not yet implemented.

tasks.title: Timeline query — queryFacts with asOf date parameter
tasks.reason: Not in Cortex at all currently. Identified in ADR 008 as a missing kernel method. Needed for Brain migration scenarios where temporal queries are required.

tasks.title: KyberAgent Cortex adoption
tasks.reason: On hold — schema gaps identified, codebase in flux. Waiting for KyberBot adoption to stabilise and publish to land first.
